The Capparis plant is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region, and its leaves, stems, and flowers are used in herbal medicine.

The health benefits of the Capparis plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties.

The bioactive constituents of the Capparis plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with the Capparis plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
